title: AQMesh raw gas reading
description: A single object from the LocationData/Next gas endpoint (AQMesh API manual §4.13). Each batch file is a JSON array of these objects. Sentinel values (-1000 through -991) indicate a channel is unusable and are converted to NaN during cleaning.

gas_reading_number.description: Unique per-reading identifier. Used for deduplication; when the same reading_number appears in multiple raw files, the last occurrence wins.

location_number.description: Pod location identifier, also used as the storage partition key (location=<n>).

pod_serial_number.description: Hardware serial number of the AQMesh pod.

reading_datestamp.description: UTC timestamp of the reading, ISO 8601 format (e.g. 2019-04-19T09:15:00).

battery_low.description: True when the battery is below the low-voltage threshold.

co_prescaled.description: CO raw sensor value, ppb. Sentinels: -1000 (not fitted), -999 (stabilising), -998 through -991 (other faults).

co_slope.description: CO calibration multiplier. Calibrated value = prescaled × slope + offset.

co_units.description: CO units string as reported by the API.

no_prescaled.description: NO raw sensor value, ppb. Sentinel values as per co_prescaled.

so2_prescaled.description: SO2 raw sensor value, ppb. Sentinel values as per co_prescaled.

no2_prescaled.description: NO2 raw sensor value, ppb. Sentinel values as per co_prescaled.

o3_prescaled.description: O3 raw sensor value, ppb. Sentinel values as per co_prescaled.

h2s_prescaled.description: H2S raw sensor value, ppb. Sentinel values as per co_prescaled.

eo_prescaled.description: Electrochemical oxidant raw value, ppb. Sentinel values as per co_prescaled.
